CREDIT SERVICERS AND CREDIT PURCHASERS ACT
(PASSPORTING)

[ L.S. 645.01

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 645.01
REGOLAMENTI DWAR CREDIT SERVICERS AND
CREDIT PURCHASERS ACT (PASSPORTING)
30 ta’ Lulju, 2024
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 172 tal-2024.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
